recommendations.title: Hoodwinked Too! Hood VS. Evil
recommendations.overview: Red Riding Hood is training in the group of Sister Hoods, when she and the Wolf are called to examine the sudden mysterious disappearance of Hansel and Gretel.

recommendations.title: The Return of the Living Dead
recommendations.overview: When two bumbling employees at a medical supply warehouse accidentally release a deadly gas into the air, the vapors cause the dead to rise again as zombies.

recommendations.title: Dante's Inferno: An Animated Epic
recommendations.overview: Dante journeys through the nine circles of Hell -- limbo, lust, gluttony, greed, anger, heresy, violence, fraud and treachery -- in search of his true love, Beatrice. An animated version of the video game of the same name.
recommendations.director: Sangjin Kim, Jong-Sik Nam, Victor Cook, Yasuomi Umetsu, Shukou Murase, Lee Seung-Gyu, Mike Disa

recommendations.title: The Resurrected
recommendations.overview: Charles Dexter Ward, a wealthy scientist, uses an ancient diary and human remains to begin a terrifying and bloody pursuit for immortality.

recommendations.title: Space Pirate Captain Harlock
recommendations.overview: Space Pirate Captain Harlock and his fearless crew face off against the space invaders who seek to conquer the planet Earth.

recommendations.title: Dead Space: Downfall

recommendations.title: The Martian

recommendations.title: Harbinger Down

recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, Action, Fantasy
